---
title: "BUSN 41902 — Code companion"
---

## Overview

This site hosts Python implementations and worked numerical demonstrations
of the methods taught in **BUSN 41902: Statistical Inference I** (Booth PhD
core econometrics). It is the runnable companion to the LaTeX lecture notes
in [good-student-note](https://github.com/dafu-zhu/good-student-note) under
`notes/busn41902/`.

> **Division of labor.** The lecture notes derive the math — *how does it
> come?* This site shows the math becoming computation — *how is it
> implemented?* and *how does it behave on data?*

## Page structure

Every demo follows the same three-section layout:

1. **Methodology recap** — terse statement of the result the lecture proved
   (no derivation; the lecture has it).
2. **Implementation walkthrough** — step-by-step exposition of the code,
   linking to canonical library docs (NumPy, SciPy) for primitives used.
3. **Numerical demonstration** — a concrete worked example with figures
   and tables. The same code that produced the figures is shown above them.

## Lectures

| Lecture | Topic | Demos |
|---|---|---|
| L1 | (TBD) | (in progress) |
| L2 | (TBD) | (in progress) |
| L3 | (TBD) | (in progress) |
| L5 | (TBD) | (in progress) |
| L6 | (TBD) | (in progress) |
| L8 | (TBD) | (in progress) |

L4 and L7 have no companion code in the lecturer's materials.

## Algorithm fidelity

All algorithms are implemented from `numpy`/`scipy` primitives, mirroring
the lecturer's MATLAB. We do **not** delegate the taught algorithm to a
higher-level library (statsmodels, sklearn) — that would hide exactly the
thing the code is supposed to demonstrate. Library docs are linked when
introducing a primitive (e.g. `np.linalg.solve`, `scipy.sparse.spdiags`),
but the algorithm itself is hand-rolled.

## Inconsistencies

Discrepancies between this code and the lecture notes are tracked in
[`INCONSISTENCIES.md`](https://github.com/dafu-zhu/busn41902-code/blob/main/INCONSISTENCIES.md).

## Running locally

See [the README](https://github.com/dafu-zhu/busn41902-code#install-local).
